# TypeMastery

> TypeMastery is a fast, free, distraction-free typing speed test and touch-typing practice website specifically designed and optimized for software developers and touch-typing beginners.

## Core Features
- **Distraction-Free Environment**: Dark mode, minimal interface, zero distraction layout.
- **Dedicated Programmer Mode**: Custom coding typing practice using real syntax from standard programming languages.
- **Local Storage Analytics**: Complete performance analytics (adjusted WPM, accuracy, gross WPM, streaks, session history, levels, and experience points) are saved 100% privately on the user's browser local storage. No server storage or account creation required.
- **Interactive Mechanics**: Audio feedback resembling mechanical keyboard switches (can be toggled on/off).
- **Gamified Progression**: Experience points (XP) system with leveling, streaks, and unlocked achievements (e.g. "Speed Demon", "React Pro").

## Typing Practice Modes
TypeMastery supports various practice modes tailored to different target skills:
- **Focus**: Balanced pace, error review, and daily consistency with home-row rhythm ladder words.
- **Speed**: Shorter reset windows and longer real-world prose phrases to push maximum WPM.
- **Precision**: Punishing layout designed to train clean streaks by incorporating numbers and special symbols.
- **Python**: Real Python syntax, class definitions, function headers, list comprehensions, and imports.
- **Web Dev**: Web development code typing incorporating CSS styles, HTML elements, React hooks, and JavaScript event listeners.
- **Data**: SQL queries (with uppercase keywords and snake_case tables) alongside Pandas data manipulation pipelines.
- **Custom**: Paste and practice any custom code snippet or text text.

## Main Navigation / Key Sections
- **Typing Speed Test (Main App)**: [https://www.typemastery.me/](https://www.typemastery.me/)
  - Interactive mode switcher to toggle between practice sets.
  - Reset round controls, progress percentage tracker, and live-updating analytics grids.
- **Why it is Different (Side Card)**: Summary of local-first privacy, adaptive drills, and developer support.
- **Recent Runs**: Local performance history of the last 6 completed rounds.
- **WPM Progress Chart**: Visual SVG line chart representing historical WPM improvement over time.
- **Achievements Panel**: Unlocked status of 12 developmental badges (e.g., Perfectionist, Pythonista).
- **Typing Tips & Guides**: Extensive guides on touch typing patterns, ergonomics, routines, and specific programming language typing optimization.
- **Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)**: Details on free hosting architecture, static client advantages, and future ad monetization layouts.
